allow: PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Users\\takiz\\AppData\\Local\\Python\\pythoncore-3.14-64\\Scripts"; cd C:\\Users\\takiz\\git_taki57\\SNS_video_analysis; python -m streamlit run app.py --server.port 8501)

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8501 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { foreach \($c in $conns\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "PID $\($c.OwningProcess\) \($\($p.ProcessName\)\) still listening on 8501 — stopping"; Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { "8501 is free \(no leftover process\)" })

PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Users\\takiz\\AppData\\Local\\Python\\pythoncore-3.14-64\\Scripts"; cd C:\\Users\\takiz\\git_taki57\\SNS_video_analysis; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m","streamlit","run","app.py","--server.port","8501" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8501" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "HTTP " + $r.StatusCode + " — 起動成功" } catch { "ERROR: " + $_.Exception.Message })
